description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Founder is responsible for Globally Activating the Agent Creation, Prime Transformation / Executor Transformation, Agent Token, Executor Accord,
the Founder must Activate either the Distribution Requirement Primitive or
Primitive - or may choose to Activate

The Primitives named above must first be Globally Activated before the Founder can Invoke them to finalize Agent setup. The Founder may choose to Globally Activate these Primitives individually at different times or all at once; only the Primitive Invocation must be done in a specified order.
summary: Activate Launch Agent 6 Pioneer Primitive On Plasma
description: Activates the Pioneer Chain Primitive for Launch Agent 6 on Plasma, establishing the Pioneer Incentive Pool address and applicable terms.
